snippet.client:
import (
	context "context"
	fern "github.com/path-parameters/fern"
	fernclient "github.com/path-parameters/fern/client"
)

client := fernclient.NewClient()
response, err := client.Organizations.Searchorganizations(
	context.TODO(),
	"tenant_id",
	"organization_id",
	&fern.OrganizationsSearchOrganizationsRequest{},
)

import (
	context "context"
	fernclient "github.com/path-parameters/fern/client"
)

client := fernclient.NewClient()
response, err := client.Organizations.Getorganizationuser(
	context.TODO(),
	"tenant_id",
	"organization_id",
	"user_id",
)

import (
	context "context"
	fernclient "github.com/path-parameters/fern/client"
)

client := fernclient.NewClient()
response, err := client.User.Getusermetadata(
	context.TODO(),
	"tenant_id",
	"user_id",
	1,
)

import (
	context "context"
	fern "github.com/path-parameters/fern"
	fernclient "github.com/path-parameters/fern/client"
)

client := fernclient.NewClient()
response, err := client.User.Searchusers(
	context.TODO(),
	"tenant_id",
	"user_id",
	&fern.UserSearchUsersRequest{},
)

import (
	context "context"
	fernclient "github.com/path-parameters/fern/client"
)

client := fernclient.NewClient()
response, err := client.User.Getuserspecifics(
	context.TODO(),
	"tenant_id",
	"user_id",
	1,
	"thought",
)
